PFRN Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail - 4.9mm Locking Bolt Self Tapping 34mm

Meril (AGFN System) · Locking Screws

4.9mm self-tapping locking bolt for AGFN femoral nail fixation

MaterialTitanium Alloy (Ti-6Al-7Nb)
Frequently Asked Questions

4.9mm locking bolt self tapping for proximal femoral rotational stability nail system

This product is manufactured by Meril and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the PFRN Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail - 4.9mm Locking Bolt Self Tapping 34mm, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The PFRN Proximal Femoral Rotational Stability Nail - 4.9mm Locking Bolt Self Tapping 34mm is constructed using Titanium Alloy (Ti-6Al-7Nb), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
